title: Server API: File & Bundle Downloads

use_cases.name: Download Individual File
steps: Validate provider via isAllowedFileProvider(provider) — allowed: FILE_DOWNLOAD_PROVIDERS
Resolve file path via getFilePath(type, provider, id) → dist/{provider}/{configDir}/skills/{id}/SKILL.md
Return Response with Content-Type: application/octet-stream and Content-Disposition attachment

use_cases.name: Download Bundle
steps: Return Response with Content-Type: application/zip and Content-Disposition: attachment; filename='impeccable-style-{provider}.zip'

key_functions.handleFileDownload: async (type, provider, id) → Response — validates inputs, resolves path, streams SKILL.md file
key_functions.handleBundleDownload: async (provider) → Response — validates provider, streams pre-built zip from dist/
key_functions.getFilePath: (type, provider, id) → string|null — maps provider to config dir, builds dist path

key_relationships: validation.js imports BUNDLE_DOWNLOAD_PROVIDERS, DOWNLOAD_PROVIDERS, FILE_DOWNLOAD_PROVIDERS from download-providers.js
include_extend_relationships: Download Individual File <<include>> Validate File Provider
Download Individual File <<include>> Resolve File Path
Download Individual File <<extend>> File Not Found (404)
important_notes: File downloads serve SKILL.md files from dist/{provider}/{configDir}/skills/{id}/. Bundle downloads serve pre-built zip files from dist/{provider}.zip. File and bundle provider sets are disjoint. All validation is synchronous; file I/O uses Node fs/promises. sanitizeFilename used on both filenames and provider names in Content-Disposition headers.
